backtest_summary.dedupe_explanation: Repeated 15-minute AWS scans are counted once per target, market, and side, using the first approved (entry) snapshot so approved metrics reflect trades actually taken, not the decayed last scan.

challenger.reason: clean-blend/combined has 23 outcome rows; needs more than 180 rows for this walk-forward comparison.

comparison.label: Not enough clean challenger data yet
comparison.recommendation: Keep AWS execution pinned to lstm.

learnings: Lower-bound edge split: edge_lcb<0 trades netted $-21.07 (23 trades) vs edge_lcb>=0 at $+3.71 (8 trades).
NO side: 15/28 won, net $-19.31 this window.
YES side: 1/3 won, net $+1.95 this window.
Profile split: live 0/1 won ($-0.53); research 16/30 won ($-16.83). Judge each gate set on its own book; research-profile losses are expected data-collection cost.
Most frequent gate rejections: source spread (18792x); edge (13146x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.70F across 7 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Window ROI is materially negative on a fair sample; audit the largest losers for a shared failure mode before the next change.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.70F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.

action_items: Backfill or collect Kalshi trades/candles until at least 30 after-cost rows exist; current trade rows: 0.

profitability_gate.reason: No dataset source gets live trading weight until it has an after-cost market backtest with at least 30 matched trades. Current collected trade rows: 0.

dataset_research.promotion_rule: Collect broadly, but do not give a new source live model weight or loosen paper-trading gates until it improves held-out forecast error and then survives an after-cost market backtest with enough trades.

disclaimer: Paper-trading research only. The active AWS execution calibration remains pinned to lstm; this artifact does not place live orders.
